name: Lexar Silver Plus UHS-I microSDXC Memory Card with SD Adapter
description: The SILVER PLUS UHS-I microSDXC Memory Card from Lexar features a storage capacity and takes advantage of the UHS-I bus to support Full HD and 4K/60p video.

features.64GB: 64GB Storage Capacity | UHS-I / V30 / U3 / Class 10 | Max Read Speed: 205 MB/s | Max Write Speed: 100 MB/s | Min Write Speed: 30 MB/s | Records 4K, Full HD, and 3D Video | IPX7 Rated for Water Resistance | Resists Wear, Temperatures, and X-Rays | Resists Vibration, Magnets, Shock & More | Includes microSD to SD Adapter
features.128GB: 128GB Storage Capacity | UHS-I / V30 / U3 / Class 10 | Max Read Speed: 205 MB/s | Max Write Speed: 150 MB/s | Min Write Speed: 30 MB/s | Records 4K, Full HD, and 3D Video | IPX7 Rated for Water Resistance | Resists Wear, Temperatures, and X-Rays | Resists Vibration, Magnets, Shock & More | Includes microSD to SD Adapter
features.256GB: 256GB Storage Capacity | UHS-I / V30 / U3 / Class 10 | Max Read Speed: 205 MB/s | Max Write Speed: 150 MB/s | Min Write Speed: 30 MB/s | Records 4K, Full HD, and 3D Video | IPX7 Rated for Water Resistance | Resists Wear, Temperatures, and X-Rays | Resists Vibration, Magnets, Shock & More | Includes microSD to SD Adapter
